name: @stackra/frontend
purpose: Internal manifest / registry package — surfaces the workspace's frontend catalogue to tooling and the CLI (placeholder pending real API).
capabilities: Aggregates the workspace frontend package inventory
Consumed by the stackra new capability multiselect
when_to_use: Tooling needs a single import that reflects every registered @stackra/* frontend package.
when_not_to_use: For real capability lookups use CatalogReader over each package's catalog.json instead.
